text:
i am using H8DGI-F-O board aith amd 16 core cpu

i am installing thunder cache based on free bsd 9.1 version a lot of error when system start

error signal 10 core dumped

on many pid 

cant do ping no ssh network is totaly disabled 


so please i need a solution for my new server 

btw am installing the same software on an intel board and i dont have any problem 


thanks in advance 
Rabih Saade
